properties.dcterms:title: SCHUNK EGK Small Component Gripper
properties.dcterms:description: The EGK is an intelligent, electric 2-finger parallel gripper designed for handling small components. It features adjustable gripping force from 50 N to 300 N, integrated control electronics, and support for multiple industrial protocols like PROFINET and IO-Link. It is suitable for electronics manufacturing and laboratory automation.

properties.rodeos:modelParameters: {'manufacturer': 'SCHUNK', 'modelName': 'EGK', 'mass': '0.58 kg - 1.63 kg', 'grippingForce': '50 N - 300 N', 'strokePerJaw': '26.5 mm - 51.5 mm', 'driveSystem': 'Brushless flat motor', 'connectivity': ['PROFINET', 'EtherCAT', 'EtherNet/IP', 'Modbus RTU', 'IO-Link'], 'protectionClass': 'IP level not specified, suitable for clean to slightly contaminated environments'}

properties.rodeos:interfaceProtocol: PROFINET, EtherCAT, EtherNet/IP, Modbus RTU, IO-Link
